message:
fix(doctor): Show all available LLM providers, not just configured one

- Check for any available provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google)
- Show auto-fallback message when configured provider unavailable
- List all supported providers in the 'no key' message
- Include availableProviders in check details

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
